items.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Caterpillar After Its 60% 2025 Rally?
items.description: If you are wondering whether Caterpillar at around $576 a share is still a smart buy or if the best gains are already behind it, you are not alone. That is exactly what we are going to unpack here. Despite a recent 2.3% pullback over the last week, the stock is still up 4.7% over the past month and 60.2% year to date, continuing a multiyear run that has seen it climb 255.3% over five years. Behind those moves, investors have been digesting a stream of headlines about infrastructure spending,...

items.title: How Caterpillar Crushed the Magnificent 7 in 2025 — And It’s Not Done Yet!
items.description: While artificial intelligence (AI) continues to dominate market headlines in 2025, many of the stocks most closely tied to the technology — the Magnificent 7 stocks of Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOG)(NASDAQ:GOOGL), Amazon (NASDAQ:AMZN), Apple (NASDAQ:AAPL), Meta Platforms (NASDAQ:META), Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT), Nvidia (NASDAQ:NVDA), and Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) — have shown volatility or lagged.
